subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards the horizon of His Cause, soared in its atmosphere, and recognized that from which others turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی افق امره و طار فی هوائه و عرف ما اعرض عنه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution
